description_long: This combat tactical vehicle is a heavily armored, futuristic ground or space vehicle with a robust, angular chassis and a predominantly dark gray and orange color scheme. The body features multiple reinforced panels, visible hatches, and modular sections, suggesting high durability and adaptability for combat scenarios. Several weapon mounts are distributed along the sides and top, with what appear to be turrets or sensor arrays positioned for maximum coverage. The vehicle's surface is covered in detailed paneling, vents, and mechanical components, indicating advanced engineering and possible propulsion or power systems at the rear. Markings and numbers are visible on the upper surfaces, adding to its tactical appearance. The overall design is sleek yet intimidating, optimized for both protection and offensive capability in urban environments.
description: A heavily armored, angular combat tactical vehicle with dark gray and orange paneling, multiple weapon mounts, and detailed mechanical features. Markings and reinforced sections enhance its robust, futuristic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, reinforced prow with angular armor, central cockpit area, and forward-facing weapon mounts.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the vehicle's elongated body, multiple weapon hardpoints, detailed paneling, and large rear propulsion or engine section.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the robust engine or thruster assembly, rear armor plating, and symmetrical design elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing additional weapon mounts, surface details, and tactical markings.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible weapon mounts: two on each side near the front and midsection, and two on the top, likely for turrets or sensor arrays.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced sections on the front, sides, and rear; sloped and modular panels for increased protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid color scheme with dark gray and orange geometric panels; no traditional camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: White numbers and red markings on the upper surfaces and sides; no insignia or unit symbols visible.
